description_long: This object consists of two stacked, round donuts with a soft, slightly glossy surface and a peachy-orange color gradient. The top donut is smaller and sits directly on the larger bottom donut, both featuring a subtle, speckled texture reminiscent of baked dough. Atop the upper donut is a dollop of white cream or icing, garnished with a small green leaf, adding a decorative touch. The front side of the donuts displays cute, stylized facial expressions with closed eyes and a small mouth, giving the object a playful, character-like appearance. The donuts rest on a flat, circular white plate that provides a clean and simple base. The overall presentation is whimsical and inviting, suitable for display in a bakery, café, or festive urban setting.
description: A pair of stacked, peach-colored donuts with cute faces, topped with white cream and a green leaf, presented on a white plate.
description_view_0: The donuts are seen from the side, showing the cream and leaf topping, with no visible facial features.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the cute facial expressions on both donuts, along with the cream and leaf topping.
description_view_2: A side-rear angle shows the cream and leaf, with the facial features partially obscured.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the stacked donuts and topping, with no facial features visible.
attribute_icing_type: plain white cream with a smooth, slightly glossy finish on top of the upper donut
attribute_topping_type: green leaf decoration (likely fondant or marzipan)
